The blue cross moved from center [42, 48] to [45, 48] after DOWN. The step size is 3.
The blue targets are still all present: [(36, 27), (48, 15), (48, 33), (60, 27)]. No targets were collected yet.
Now I need to understand: how are targets collected? The blue cross center is at [45, 48]. The nearest blue target is [48, 33], which is 3 down and 15 left from the center. That's 1 DOWN and 5 LEFT.
But wait - maybe targets are collected when any part of the shape passes over them, not just the center. Let me check if the blue cross's arm passes over any target.
The blue cross arms are:
- Vertical: from [32, 48] to [58, 48] (center column 48)
- Horizontal: from [45, 35] to [45, 61] (center row 45)
None of the blue targets [(36, 27), (48, 15), (48, 33), (60, 27)] are on these lines.
So targets are NOT collected by the shape passing over them. They must be collected by the center (white dot) passing over them.
Let me plan the collection:

Blue targets: [36, 27], [48, 15], [48, 33], [60, 27]
To collect [48, 33]: need to go 3 down, 15 left = 1 DOWN, 5 LEFT
